text:
There lived a lonely old crow old Owl.

One autumn morning Owl hadn sidebars.

He set out to the big town.

He flew low.

He wanted the townspeople chat.

"A night owl like you?

You oughta see my pet hawk."

They laughed!

So next owl evening Owl stayed.

They talked.

Owl said...

"I can't fly like you. I wish I could.

All I do is screech.

I couldn't even talk.

That would kill me."

They cried.

Ohhh.

"Don't die.

Just sing.

I love your song."

They listened.

For Owl never sang again.

But ever since...

That's why I come.

They cherish me now.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
